message:
update crd and vars for hybrid opt per Lionel

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ Helm chart for Workload-Variant-Autoscaler (WVA) - GPU-aware autoscaler for LLM
 | vllmService.nodePort | int | `30000` |  |
 | vllmService.scheme | string | `"http"` |  |
 | wva.enabled | bool | `true` |  |
-| wva.experimentalProactiveModel | bool | `false` |  |
+| wva.experimentalHybridOptimization | bool | `false` |  |
 | wva.image.repository | string | `"ghcr.io/llm-d/workload-variant-autoscaler"` |  |
 | wva.image.tag | string | `"latest"` |  |
 | wva.imagePullPolicy | string | `"Always"` |  |

@@ -123,7 +123,6 @@ spec:
                       - acc
                       - accCount
                       - maxBatchSize
-                      - perfParms
                       type: object
                     minItems: 1
                     type: array
@@ -146,10 +145,14 @@ spec:
                 - key
                 - name
                 type: object
+              variantCost:
+                default: "10.0"
+                description: VariantCost specifies the cost per replica for this variant
+                  (used in capacity analysis).
+                pattern: ^\d+(\.\d+)?$
+                type: string
             required:
             - modelID
-            - modelProfile
-            - sloClassRef
             type: object
           status:
             description: Status represents the current status of autoscaling for the
@@ -317,4 +320,4 @@ spec:
     served: true
     storage: true
     subresources:
-      status: {}
+      status: {}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -84,11 +84,11 @@ spec:
               configMapKeyRef:
                 name: workload-variant-autoscaler-variantautoscaling-config
                 key: WVA_SCALE_TO_ZERO
-          - name:  WVA_EXPERIMENTAL_PROACTIVE_MODEL
+          - name:  EXPERIMENTAL_HYBRID_OPTIMIZATION
             valueFrom:
               configMapKeyRef:
                 name: workload-variant-autoscaler-variantautoscaling-config
-                key:  WVA_EXPERIMENTAL_PROACTIVE_MODEL
+                key:  EXPERIMENTAL_HYBRID_OPTIMIZATION
         name: manager
         ports:
           - name: healthz

@@ -34,7 +34,11 @@ wva:
     #   YOUR_CA_CERTIFICATE_HERE
     #   -----END CERTIFICATE-----
 
-  experimentalProactiveModel: false  # Enable experimental proactive scaling model (default: false)
+  # Environment variable to enable experimental hybrid-based optimization
+	## When "on", runs both capacity analyzer and model-based optimizer with arbitration
+	## When "model-only" runs model-based optimizer only
+	## When "off" or unset, runs capacity analyzer only (default, reactive mode)
+  experimentalHybridOptimization: false  # Enable experimental proactive scaling model (default: false)
   scaleToZero: false  # Enable scaling variants to zero replicas (default: false)
 
 llmd:

@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ wva:
     #   YOUR_CA_CERTIFICATE_HERE
     #   -----END CERTIFICATE-----
 
-  experimentalProactiveModel: false  # Enable experimental proactive scaling model (default: false)
+  experimentalHybridOptimization: false  # Enable experimental hybrid optimization (default: false)
   scaleToZero: false  # Enable scaling variants to zero replicas (default: false)
 
 llmd:
